# SocialMate

> Free social media scheduling and Creator OS — schedule, create, and manage content across 5 live platforms with 12 built-in AI tools.

SocialMate is a web-based social media management platform built for creators, streamers, small businesses, and agencies. Free to start. No credit card required. No per-channel fees.

Live at: https://socialmate.studio
Launched: March 26, 2026
Company: Gilgamesh Enterprise LLC (Wyoming LLC)
Founder: Joshua Bostic
Contact: socialmate.updates@gmail.com

## What SocialMate Does

- Schedule and publish posts to Bluesky, Discord, Telegram, Mastodon, and X/Twitter (5 platforms live)
- Clips Studio: browse Twitch clips (OAuth) or YouTube videos (channel URL, no API key) and schedule them to all platforms in one click; search any public Twitch channel's top clips
- 12 AI-powered tools: caption generation, hashtag research, post rewriter, viral hook generator, thread generator, content repurposer, post score, SM-Pulse, SM-Radar, content gap detector, AI content calendar (Pro+), AI image generation (Pro+)
- Bulk scheduler — upload and schedule many posts at once with per-platform character limit enforcement
- Link in Bio page builder — free on all plans, custom themes and button styles
- Competitor tracking — track up to 3 competitor accounts on free plan
- Evergreen recycling — mark posts as evergreen and they auto-requeue when schedule is empty
- RSS/blog import — pull from any RSS or Atom feed and turn into scheduled posts
- Team collaboration — multi-seat, role-based access, content approval workflows
- Client workspaces — isolated workspaces per client (Agency plan)
- Analytics — posting streaks, platform breakdown, best times, consistency scores
- 29 sidebar color themes
- Notification system — in-app notifications for publish success/failure
- 3-email onboarding sequence (welcome, day 2 tip, day 5 check-in)

## Platforms

### Live Now
- Bluesky
- Discord
- Telegram
- Mastodon
- X/Twitter (pay-per-use, $0.01/tweet, quota enforced by plan)

### Coming Soon
- Threads (Meta opened API 2024, no special approval required)
- YouTube posting (YouTube Data API v3)
- Reddit

### Planned
- LinkedIn (API application pending)
- Pinterest (API application pending)
- Instagram
- Facebook
- TikTok

## Pricing

- Free: $0/month — 50 AI credits/month, 2 team seats, 100 posts/month, 2-week scheduling window, link in bio, all core features
- Pro: $5/month or $55/year — 500 AI credits/month, 5 seats, full scheduling window
- Agency: $20/month or $209/year — 2,000 AI credits/month, 15 seats, 5 client workspaces
- White Label Basic: +$20/month — custom logo, colors, branding
- White Label Pro: +$40/month — custom domain + everything above
- AI Credit Packs: $1.99 (100cr), $4.99 (300cr), $9.99 (750cr), $19.99 (2,000cr)

## Affiliate Program

- 30% recurring commission on all subscription payments
- Milestone: 100+ active recurring referrals → 40% forever
- 10% flat on Starter + Popular credit packs
- 15% flat on Pro + Max credit packs
- Affiliate page: https://socialmate.studio/affiliate

## Studio Stax

Curated directory of creator tools and resources at https://socialmate.studio/studio-stax. Listings are founder-approved and ranked by SM-Give donation amounts and listing age.

## SM-Give

Built-in charitable initiative. 2% of all subscription revenue goes to charitable causes. Users can make voluntary in-app donations.

## Gilgamesh's Guide

Free guide for entrepreneurs, creators, and self-starters by founder Joshua Bostic. Waitlist: https://socialmate.studio/gilgamesh

## Enki — Autonomous Trading Bot

Companion product by Gilgamesh Enterprise LLC. Self-contained autonomous trading bot for stocks and crypto.

- Landing page: https://socialmate.studio/enki
- Public leaderboard: https://socialmate.studio/enki/leaderboard
